title: Aesthetic Stairs
description: Adds decorative, functional stairs and stair rails from all vanilla and modded woods! Perfect for builders who want detailed interiors and smooth, stylish stairways.
body:
**Aesthetic Stairs** brings beautifully designed functional and decorative stair blocks to Minecraft, crafted from every vanilla wood type—and extended with support for modded woods from Arboreal Nature and Wild Fields.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee0532ed3902aa24ead45fecf3d082e0704bf971.png)

Take your builds to the next level (literally!) with staircases that feel right in every setting — rustic cabins, grand halls, modern homes, or medieval towers. And with the addition of stair rails, you can finish your stairways with smooth, connected railing elements for added realism and detail.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fb93792fdc598e766a96b4823c0ab847a80b843_0.webp)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37e31cdba9e4c60c32941d40e4fb7b0f67964236_0.webp)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3582fd1c3d4b81a736011399419dd6a359578e33_0.webp)

## Stairs in All Vanilla Wood Types
Available in oak, birch, spruce, jungle, acacia, dark oak, mangrove, cherry, bamboo, and more—each with carefully matched textures.

## Modded Wood Support
If you have Arboreal Nature or Wild Fields installed, you'll unlock additional stair styles from their unique wood types.

## Unique Stair Designs
Custom models and shapes to add more variety and flavor than standard stairs. Ideal for builders who want better form and function.

## Connected Stair Rails
Optional stair rails that can connect to stairs for added detail. Great for realistic homes, balconies, spiral staircases, and interior design.

## Survival-Friendly Crafting Recipes
All stair and rail blocks are accessible via logical, balanced recipes that fit cleanly into Minecraft’s crafting system.
